title: podocarpus motleyi
intro: Podocarpus motleyi, also known as the Motley's yellow-pod, is a species of coniferous tree native to New Caledonia, and it belongs to the family Podocarpaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Podocarpus motleyi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
